title: Floral Crispy Indian Manchego Salad
description: A fragrant, low‑calorie salad that marries the nutty sharpness of Manchego with roasted chickpeas, crisp greens, and a splash of rose water for a floral finish.
instructions: Pat dry the chickpeas and toss them with 1 tsp olive oil, 1/2 tsp cumin, 1/4 tsp salt, and a pinch of pepper.
Spread the chickpeas on a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes, turning halfway through, until golden and crunchy.
While the chickpeas roast, chop the salad greens, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, and toast the pine nuts in a dry skillet over medium heat for 2 minutes until fragrant.
Whisk together lemon juice, rose water, 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, and cumin to make the dressing.
In a large bowl, combine the greens, tomatoes, cucumber, roasted chickpeas, and toasted pine nuts.
Drizzle the dressing over the salad, toss gently to coat.
Fold in the diced Manchego cheese.
Top the salad with edible rose petals for a floral flourish.
Serve immediately, optionally garnishing with a few extra rose petals.
